overall.description: A nighttime walk through the historic city of Saint Denis in Red Dead Redemption 2, featuring snow-dusted cobblestone streets illuminated by gas lamps. The character exits a building, navigates past pedestrians and a passing trolley, and cuts through narrow alleys between classical architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: alley exit leading to historic street

events.description: character exits through metal gate from enclosed alley onto open cobblestone street
emerging from shadow into area illuminated by street gas lamps

agents.ego_description: walking out of a narrow passage through a metal gate into the snowy street

entered.detail: wrought iron gate with vertical bars marking the exit from the alley
wet cobblestone pavement reflecting the warm glow of street lamps
cast iron gas lamp post emitting warm yellow light
two-story wooden building with balcony and lit windows

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a dark narrow alley looking out through a metal gate. The character exits onto a snow-dusted cobblestone street, transitioning from enclosed darkness to the open illuminated historic district. Gas lamps cast warm reflections on the wet stones as the character steps onto the sidewalk.

events.description: character turns right to follow the sidewalk along the building front
passing by NPCs standing near a building entrance with warm lamplight

agents.ego_description: strolling along the wooden sidewalk, passing pedestrians and observing the lit storefronts

notable_agents.action: man in red coat standing near building entrance, looking at something in his hands

entered.detail: elevated wooden plank walkway running alongside the buildings
doorway with steps and warm interior light spilling onto the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: Walking along the elevated wooden sidewalk of the historic district, passing by warmly lit building entrances. The character encounters several NPCs, including a man in a red coat near a doorway. The cobblestone street runs parallel to the sidewalk, with bare trees and additional buildings visible across the way.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza approaching classical government building with columns

events.description: moving from narrow sidewalk into open plaza area in front of large columned building
horse-drawn carriage passes by on the street to the right

agents.ego_description: crossing the open plaza toward the grand building entrance, navigating around other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: black horse-drawn carriage with driver moving along the street

entered.detail: impressive stone building with tall ionic columns and grand staircase entrance
black wrought iron fence with stone pillars running along the sidewalk
closed carriage with large wooden wheels and lantern lights

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by a grand classical building with illuminated columns. The character crosses the open cobblestone area, passing other pedestrians heading toward the building steps. A horse-drawn carriage moves along the adjacent street, and an ornate iron fence lines the left side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: street with tram tracks and passing trolley

events.description: electric trolley tram passes by on the tracks running down the street center
character continues walking alongside the moving trolley as it passes

agents.ego_description: walking parallel to the moving trolley, observing the tram cars passing by on the tracks

notable_agents.action: lit trolley tram moving along tracks with passengers visible through windows

entered.detail: long electric streetcar with illuminated interior windows and wooden exterior
metal rails embedded in the cobblestone street for the tram line

segments.scene_description: Walking along the street as a large electric trolley passes by on the center tracks, its interior lights glowing warmly against the night. The character moves along the wooden sidewalk next to an iron fence, with the trolley moving in the same direction before pulling ahead. Historic buildings line the opposite side of the street.

events.description: character turns left into a narrow alleyway between tall brick buildings
exiting the narrow alley back onto the main cobblestone street

agents.ego_description: cutting through a narrow alleyway between buildings to reach the other side

entered.detail: tight passage between tall brick walls with snow falling gently
ornate stone columns with gold banding on the building corner

segments.scene_description: The character ducks into a narrow alley between tall buildings, leaving the open street behind. The passage is dimly lit with snowflakes visible in the air, featuring ornate stone columns on the corner building. After a brief walk through the enclosed space, the character emerges back onto the main cobblestone street near a lit street lamp.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the shadows of a narrow alley into the illuminated bustle of a historic city district before retreating back into a secluded passage. It begins by exiting a metal gate from a dark alleyway onto snow-dusted cobblestones, where the enclosed darkness gives way to the warm glow of gas lamps reflecting off wet stones. As the camera moves along an elevated wooden sidewalk past warmly lit entrances and pedestrians, the scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by a grand classical building with illuminated columns and passing horse-drawn carriages. The perspective then follows the street as a glowing electric trolley glides past on center tracks, moving parallel to the character along an ornate iron fence. Finally, the camera ducks away from the open street into a dimly lit, snowy alley between tall stone buildings before emerging once more under the light of a distant street lamp.
